productDisplayName: Manchester United Men Navy Blue Shorts
description: CompositionBlue shorts made of 65% cotton and 35% polyester, has elasticated waistband with drawcord tie at inner front, two side seam pockets, brand badge print on left thigh and a patch pocket on the left hip pocket with appliquéd brandingFitRegularWash careMachine wash warmWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleachTumble dry lowCool iron, do not iron on printDress for comfort with these Official Merchandise manchester united shorts. These soft and comfortable shorts pay homage to the incredibly successful team with a bold club badge on the front. Team this with a tee for a game of footie or for relaxing at home when only the genuine Man U article will do.Model StatisticsThe product is a size 34 on a model of height 6' and waist 32"
